text:
I just wanna say thanks for these videos you’ve put out with all these comps man, they do help so much for someone like me who’s still trying to get my way around all the comps and synergies in this game. I only have one character that’s pretty close to +12, the next characters that have my most copies are mouchette and kathi with +2 and e3 respectively.

If at all possible, could you maybe show off carry helot or maybe a helot and g helot team? I have g helot e1 

Basically, I am a noob with this game and am still stumped on how to play comps properly sometimes 😅

author: @noggingnugget9174
text: I find Arachne's design amazing and definitely want to pull her tho I think imma wait till she gets an actual return banner (not the daily banner's that just passed cause they're lowk kinda scammy. Ended up not getting Pickman after 130 pulls btw) Just have some small questions regarding her kit, so if I want to use her in endgame what is the minimum amount of investment I'd need to make her work, dupe wise. And just what exactly does Realm Mastery affect do for her? I'm aware that it increases her exalt DMG Amp with her E1 but does it also affect her shields? Cause I've used a couple Arachne supps before with double realm mastery wheels and her shields are CHONKY though I read through her kit and her shielding apparently doesn't scale off of Realm Mastery?
video_title: Pulling Arachne in Morimens is your DESTINY!

author: @kevenshop853
text:
Realm mastery scaling is extremely bad
You much rather build Damage amp on Arachne as that's the ONLY thing she scales off besides base levels
She already gets damage amp steroids from from her exalt and sig yes, but more damage amp on her is still miles better than buffing singularity beacon with RM
video_title: Pulling Arachne in Morimens is your DESTINY!
